project.name: Frendly Business Logic
project.description: Business domain map for backend, mobile, and admin flows.

nodes.name: Identity and Session
nodes.summary: Handles phone login, Telegram login, social login, token refresh, logout, and current user lookup.

businessRules: A user needs a valid session token for protected mobile API calls.
Phone OTP, Telegram, Google, and Yandex login all converge into user/session creation.
Admin and partner accounts use separate auth flows from regular users.

nodes.name: Events and Meetups
nodes.summary: Covers event discovery, event creation, join requests, invites, participation, check-in, live meetup state, after-party, and feedback.

businessRules: Event lists filter blocked users and apply access, lifestyle, price, gender, date, and geo constraints.
Capacity is checked before joining or approving requests.
Hosts can approve requests, reject requests, start live state, finish live state, and manually check in participants.

nodes.name: Evening Routes and Sessions
nodes.summary: Handles route templates, route recommendation, session launch, session join flow, step check-ins, partner offer codes, after-party feedback, and route completion.

businessRules: Route options are selected by goal, mood, budget, format, and area.
Session privacy controls whether joining is open, request based, or invite based.
Partner offer codes are issued per user, session, step, and offer.

nodes.name: Chat and Realtime
nodes.summary: Owns meetup chats, direct chats, message history, unread counts, read state, WebSocket auth, queued mobile commands, message attachments, and realtime fanout.

businessRules: Users can only read chats they belong to.
Blocked users are filtered from chat previews and message history.
Mobile queues outgoing commands when the socket is unavailable and restores them after reconnect.

nodes.name: Profile Discovery and Social
nodes.summary: Covers profile editing, onboarding, public user profiles, people discovery, dating discovery, likes, matches, communities, stories, posters, and shares.

businessRules: Discovery excludes blocked users and respects viewer state.
Dating actions produce likes, skips, or matches depending on reciprocal state.
Profile media and public share links are mediated through backend ownership checks.

nodes.name: Safety Trust and Notifications
nodes.summary: Handles safety preferences, trusted contacts, reports, user blocks, SOS, verification, notifications, push tokens, and background delivery.

businessRules: Blocked users are filtered from discovery, events, and chat views.
Push tokens are registered per user/device and can be removed by token or device id.
Reports and SOS actions preserve user context for review and support.

nodes.name: Admin and Partner Operations
nodes.summary: Covers admin login, partner account approval, route template management, venue and offer management, partner portal meetups, community content, posters, and featured requests.

businessRules: Partner accounts can be approved, rejected, or suspended by admins.
Evening route templates can be drafted, revised, published, or archived.
Partner content goes through create, update, submit, archive, and review states.

nodes.name: Phone and Social Login
nodes.summary: User authenticates with phone OTP, Telegram, Google, Yandex, or test shortcut, then receives access and refresh tokens.

nodes.name: Event Discovery
nodes.summary: Mobile requests event lists with filters, search, geo bounds, and pagination. Backend filters blocked users and maps events into cards.

nodes.name: Meetup Join and Live
nodes.summary: User joins or requests access to an event, host reviews requests, participants check in, and the meetup moves through live and after-party states.

nodes.name: Evening Route Session
nodes.summary: User resolves a route, launches a session, guests join, steps are checked in or advanced, and the route finishes with after-party state.

nodes.name: Partner Offer Code
nodes.summary: An evening session step can issue a partner offer code, check code status, and activate public codes.

nodes.name: Message Sync
nodes.summary: Mobile opens a chat, loads history through REST, sends commands over WebSocket, stores offline commands, and marks messages read.

nodes.name: Profile and Onboarding
nodes.summary: User completes onboarding, edits profile fields, uploads photos, and exposes a viewer-safe profile to other users.

nodes.name: Dating Match
nodes.summary: Users browse dating profiles, review likes, send dating actions, and receive matches when actions become reciprocal.

nodes.name: Safety and Blocking
nodes.summary: User configures safety data, manages trusted contacts, reports incidents, blocks users, and can fire SOS.

nodes.name: Push Notification Delivery
nodes.summary: Mobile registers push tokens, backend stores them, worker reads outbox events, and providers dispatch push messages.

nodes.name: Admin Route Template Lifecycle
nodes.summary: Admin creates evening route templates, edits steps, publishes, archives, revises, and can generate AI drafts.

nodes.name: Partner Content Operations
nodes.summary: Partner portal manages meetups, communities, posters, media, and featured requests while admin manages partner account status.

domainMeta.entryPoint: Partner portal and admin partner account endpoints

nodes.name: Collect login input
nodes.summary: Phone, Telegram, Google, or Yandex data is accepted by AuthController.

nodes.name: Validate identity proof
nodes.summary: AuthService, TelegramAuthService, or SocialAuthService validates the submitted proof.

nodes.name: Find or create user
nodes.summary: The backend links the verified identity to a user record.

nodes.name: Create session
nodes.summary: A session record and token pair are created for the client.

nodes.name: Bootstrap mobile session
nodes.summary: Mobile stores tokens and loads the current user through BackendRepository.

nodes.name: Request filtered list
nodes.summary: EventsController reads filter, search, geo, date, and pagination query params.

nodes.name: Build query constraints
nodes.summary: EventsService resolves blocked users, viewer gender, filters, cursor, and geo query.

nodes.name: Load and order events
nodes.summary: Events are loaded through Prisma and optional PostGIS candidates, then ordered and paginated.

nodes.name: Map event cards
nodes.summary: Event summaries include participant state, attendance, live state, and viewer-specific fields.

nodes.name: Render mobile surfaces
nodes.summary: Mobile fetches events through BackendRepository and shows tonight, map, search, and event detail screens.

nodes.name: Join or request
nodes.summary: EventsController routes direct join and join-request calls to EventsService.

nodes.name: Enforce capacity and access
nodes.summary: EventsService validates blocked users, capacity, event status, and request state.

nodes.name: Host reviews requests
nodes.summary: HostService approves or rejects join requests from the host dashboard.

nodes.name: Confirm check-in
nodes.summary: EventsService validates check-in data and writes attendance state.

nodes.name: Run live and after-party
nodes.summary: Live meetup and after-party data are exposed after check-in and meetup progress.

nodes.name: Resolve route
nodes.summary: EveningService validates goal, mood, budget, format, area, then selects a route candidate.

nodes.name: Launch route
nodes.summary: EveningService creates a session and prepares route state for the host.

nodes.name: Join session
nodes.summary: Session privacy rules decide whether joining is immediate, request based, or blocked.

nodes.name: Check in and progress steps
nodes.summary: Participants check in to route steps, then host or user advances, skips, or finishes.

nodes.name: After-party and feedback
nodes.summary: Finished sessions expose after-party data and accept feedback/photos.

nodes.name: Mobile route screens
nodes.summary: Flutter screens load route/session state and drive the evening UI.

nodes.name: Request code
nodes.summary: EveningController accepts session, step, and offer ids for the current user.

nodes.name: Issue code
nodes.summary: PartnerOfferCodeService checks access and creates a code for the user and offer.

nodes.name: Read code status
nodes.summary: The user can query code status from the authenticated evening API.

nodes.name: Activate public code
nodes.summary: Public code activation validates and marks the code as used.

nodes.name: Show QR in mobile
nodes.summary: Mobile route screens include partner offer QR entry points.

nodes.name: Load chat list
nodes.summary: ChatsService lists meetup or direct chats for the current user and filters blocked users.

nodes.name: Load messages
nodes.summary: ChatsService returns paginated message history with attachments and sender data.

nodes.name: Connect socket
nodes.summary: ChatSocketClient opens WebSocket auth and reconnect recovery on mobile.

nodes.name: Send queued command
nodes.summary: Mobile persists outgoing commands and restores them after reconnect.

nodes.name: Fan out realtime events
nodes.summary: ChatServerService handles live commands and broadcasts updates.

nodes.name: Mark read
nodes.summary: REST and socket state update read cursor and unread counts.

nodes.name: Load onboarding
nodes.summary: OnboardingService loads current onboarding state and session data.

nodes.name: Validate contact availability
nodes.summary: Onboarding can check phone/contact availability before saving.

nodes.name: Save onboarding
nodes.summary: OnboardingService persists profile and preference data.

nodes.name: Update profile
nodes.summary: ProfileService updates current user's profile fields.

nodes.name: Manage photos
nodes.summary: ProfileService handles avatar and profile photo upload, ordering, primary photo, and delete.

nodes.name: Mobile onboarding UI
nodes.summary: Flutter onboarding collects contact, birthday, location, and preferences.

nodes.name: List discover cards
nodes.summary: DatingService loads eligible profiles for the viewer.

nodes.name: List incoming likes
nodes.summary: DatingService returns users who liked the viewer.

nodes.name: Record action
nodes.summary: DatingService saves like, skip, or other action and computes match result.

nodes.name: Show mobile swipe flow
nodes.summary: DatingScreen sends user action from the mobile card UI.

nodes.name: List matches
nodes.summary: MatchesService exposes current matches.

nodes.name: Load safety state
nodes.summary: SafetyService returns current safety settings and trusted contacts.

nodes.name: Manage trusted contacts
nodes.summary: SafetyService creates and deletes trusted contacts.

nodes.name: Create report
nodes.summary: SafetyService records reports from the current user.

nodes.name: Block user
nodes.summary: SafetyService creates blocks that other domains use for filtering.

nodes.name: Fire SOS
nodes.summary: SafetyService creates an SOS event with current user context.

nodes.name: Mobile safety hub
nodes.summary: SafetyHubScreen exposes settings, reports, blocks, and SOS UI.

nodes.name: Register token
nodes.summary: NotificationsService stores push token and device metadata.

nodes.name: Create outbox event
nodes.summary: Business services create outbox events for async delivery.

nodes.name: Poll worker
nodes.summary: WorkerService reads and processes outbox events.

nodes.name: Dispatch provider
nodes.summary: Push providers send platform-specific push messages.

nodes.name: Receive on mobile
nodes.summary: Mobile push token service keeps device token state in sync.

nodes.name: Create brief
nodes.summary: AdminEveningAiService creates a route generation brief.

nodes.name: Generate drafts
nodes.summary: AdminEveningAiService generates candidate route drafts from the brief.

nodes.name: Convert draft
nodes.summary: A generated draft can become a route template.

nodes.name: Edit template
nodes.summary: AdminEveningRouteService creates, updates, and revises templates.

nodes.name: Publish or archive
nodes.summary: AdminEveningRouteService moves templates into published or archived state.

nodes.name: Admin UI
nodes.summary: Admin EveningRoutes page and RouteStepEditor drive this workflow.

nodes.name: Review partner account
nodes.summary: PartnerAuthService and admin partner controllers approve, reject, or suspend partner accounts.

nodes.name: Create partner meetup
nodes.summary: PartnerPortalService creates and updates meetups owned by the partner.

nodes.name: Review join requests
nodes.summary: PartnerPortalService lists and reviews meetup join requests.

nodes.name: Manage community content
nodes.summary: PartnerPortalService creates communities, news, and media.

nodes.name: Manage posters and featured requests
nodes.summary: PartnerPortalService creates, submits, updates, and archives poster and featured request content.

edges.description: Authenticated users browse, create, and join events.
Chat socket and REST history require current user identity.
Meetup participation creates or exposes meetup chat context.
Evening routes can share step actions and session context into chat.
Admin route templates and partner offers feed the user evening route flow.
Blocks and reports affect event visibility, participation, and review flows.
Blocks and unread/push delivery shape chat visibility and notifications.
Profiles, stories, posters, and shares enrich event discovery and detail pages.
